_description: Iconic question opens at 0:00 (≤8 words). Then 5s cold-open imagery. Restate + context. Validated on v1, v2, v3 long-forms.

structure.beat: Iconic question voice-over (≤8 words). Black screen + slow fade-in of imagery.
Cold open imagery — single still or slow ken-burns. No narration.
Restate question with date and place anchor.
Soft promise — what we'll uncover. Transition to ch1.

style_notes: First 3s decides watch-through. Question must be googleable in viewer's mind. NO 'hey welcome back' / NO music-only intros.
